message: It’s unusual for you to come here.
How many years has it been?
That kind of thing happened, huh?
Oh, right, thanks for inviting me to the party.
It’s not a big deal. Honestly, it was a party I might not have gone to if I hadn't invited someone.
You might not have gone if you hadn't invited someone? What do you mean?
The shelves are lined with shields and trophies accumulated since his school days.
The only other noticeable thing is a big television.
While it's not perfectly organized, it can't really be called messy either.
It's like the room expresses Guy's personality.
The window in this room has a nice view of Fifth Avenue.
Guy has been angry all along.
Now Guy is completely angry. This distant smile is his face when he's angry.
It's as if Guy's expression is somewhat cloudy.
Did I poke at something unpleasant?
I guess becoming famous brings these kinds of downsides to friends.
Guy was a bold man in his school days.
But ever since he made it to the Major Leagues because of his skills, he has become a man who seems restless and self-conscious.
It's about time to leave. Can you go home?
You probably thought I didn't notice, but rumors do reach my ears, you know.
Are you swallowing those rumors without verifying their truth? Our relationship isn't like that, right?
I have nothing left to say to you.
You've become a pathetic guy who delves into the profession of a detective, swallowing gossip.
Sorry for being a pathetic guy. I'm just worried about
What do you mean by saying you'd do anything for her? You have everything covered for your ex, right?
What a surprise guest just when I'm about to head out.
You’ve been acting a bit strange lately.
Isn't that more about you, Guy?
I’m just normal. Nothing has changed.
What’s up? You coming by without calling?
I was about to go on a trip.
Yeah, same as always. Oh, but I do have a job lined up right now.
I’m surprised someone would want to hire you.
That's harsh. Even for you, Guy, that stings.
So, is the client a beauty?
Why are we talking about that?
In dramas, clients are usually beautiful, aren't they?
Well, I thought if she was beautiful I might want an introduction.
Is it okay to say stuff like that? You’ve got a thing for her,
I've got nothing more to say.
I'm doing fine and healthy. Health is all I've got, you know.
Why are you asking such things?
I've been worried because it seemed like there was some trouble at the Party.
There's not really much progress. Good or bad, you know.
I’ve got nothing left to say to you.
In the end, you must still like him. A guy who's addicted to drugs and dropped out.
I never want to see your face again.
Anyway, I can’t trust you anymore. I’m sorry, but can you just go?
you started dating again, didn’t you?
I pulled you out of rock bottom, and now you forget that debt and go after my girl?
Is there such a ridiculous story? You’re not actually believing that, are you?
I do believe it, because things have been weird lately.
Don't think of me as blind.
I already knew you were with her.
Your relationship ended right after we graduated.
Oh, I know that too. That's why you got involved with drugs, right?
So, you're putting in all that effort for your ex-girlfriend, huh?
Did you become her little servant or something?
Come on, you've been in touch, haven't you? You know, during the party, it felt kind of weird, so I've been wondering.
Oh please, it's so obvious. You probably heard it from someone.
It means not everything in the article is a lie.
No way, that article wasn't leaked by Guy, was it?
It's not like you're really gonna be troubled by it. Oh, right,
if he gets in trouble, you'd have a hard time too, huh?
Haven't you turned into a bit of a self-deprecating guy?
But he’s worried about the article. Don't stress about anything.
Maybe you should just give him a call?
just because we're good friends doesn't mean you should interfere in each other's love lives.
I don't mean to do that. It's just that,
If I don't pay attention to Guy,
his girlfriend will start coming to me.
will be jealous of you. That makes sense; he's your ex.
Speaking of which, have you seen BAM?
BAM, as in Baked Apple Magazine?
Yeah. The latest issue has an article about Guy and Cindy being in a hot love affair.
Me and Cindy? Where did that rumor come from?
I don't know. The lady who wrote the article seemed really confident.
she's got a nice body, probably E-cup.
You've been quite bold about women lately.
Well, this is normal, right? You're not into women, are you?
It's a joke, don’t make such a gloomy face.
Guy might have been told something by someone.
was supposed to be dating me in secret.
looking after you? Where's that self-deprecating tone coming from?
Besides, how did Guy find out about me and
First of all, the article's content is too weird.
I can't believe Guy would say something like that.
According to the talk, it seems my relationship with Guy has worsened, but what on earth is the cause?
I wonder if someone is spreading false rumors.
Where did it all go wrong for me to
No way, I'm not so down and out that I'd go back to an ex who dumped me.
I thought things were going well.
was pleading with a face on the verge of tears, wanting to restore the relationship with Guy,
I thought that was a true cry of the heart,
but I need to get the story out of Eva. That too, urgently.
Perhaps Guy might be speaking for himself.
Eva mentioned that she seemed to have a solid source of information.
But I don't know who that is.
the breakup and later Guy's engagement to Cindy.
You need to go to Central Park right away! Director Fabar is calling for you.
It's about my credibility, you see.
